name: Sarthak Verma
review: Went for tooth cleaning, extremely satisfied with the work. The level of professionalism is at another level, the care during the treatment is excellent. Would definitely recommend to my family and peers.

name: Priyanshu kesari Priyanshu kesari
review:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I visited Dharitree Dental Care, Beltar, Mirzapur for dental cleaning and had an excellent experience. The clinic is clean, hygienic, and uses modern equipment. Dr. Kamdev did a gentle yet thorough cleaning. Best place in Mirzapur for scaling, root canal, and preventive dental care. Highly recommended!
